name: Downloaded README.md files don't render correctly in  - GitHub
snippet: Download the Raw Content: Instead of downloading the file through GitHub's interface, try downloading the raw content of the Markdown file.

name: joeyespo/grip: Preview GitHub README.md files locally before
snippet: Grip is a command-line server application written in Python that uses the GitHub markdown API to render a local readme file.
